rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of grouped citations used to justify including advertising carryover (AdStock) and to note that email and paid search often show little carryover. The citing paper does not build its core theory, optimization derivations, or empirical identification strategy on this specific study; those foundations come from optimal control and game-theoretic advertising work (e.g., Naik, Raman, and Winer). Because the citation serves as background evidence rather than a distinct functional pillar, its role is best classified as a passing mention.
